requirements.master_grid: One declared container and gutter system aligns navigation, hero, sections, form and footer.
requirements.containment: Every visible element remains within its declared owner unless an allowlisted overlay declares owner, anchor and bounds.
requirements.lines: Every line or divider belongs to one component and terminates at that component boundary.
requirements.surfaces: Each background has a semantic role: base, elevated, inverse or media.
requirements.positioning: Absolute positioning is limited to contained overlays and never used for primary document flow.
requirements.stacking: Z-index uses declared layers only and must not create hidden interactive content.
requirements.overflow: Horizontal overflow is measured and corrected at the originating element; global clipping is prohibited.
requirements.spacing: A 4px base scale and 8px macro rhythm govern gaps, padding and section intervals.
requirements.optical_alignment: Geometric measurement is supplemented by optical review for icons, text baselines and control centering.

pass_rule: All blocking defects equal zero in the tested matrix and every allowlisted overlap remains contained.
